speaker: Speaker A
text: Hey everyone, welcome to the design review meeting.

speaker: Speaker A
text: Let's start by going over the user feedback from last sprint.

speaker: Speaker B
text: Oh yeah, I actually had some thoughts on that already.

speaker: Speaker A
text: The main complaint was about the navigation being confusing.

speaker: Speaker B
text: Right, so I was thinking we could simplify the sidebar.

speaker: Speaker A
text: Hold on, let me finish the overview first.

speaker: Speaker B
text: Sorry, go ahead.

speaker: Speaker A
text: So users also mentioned the loading times were too slow.

speaker: Speaker A
text: We need to optimize the dashboard queries.

speaker: Speaker B
text: I already started working on that actually!

speaker: Speaker A
text: Wait what? We hadn't agreed on the approach yet.

speaker: Speaker B
text: I know but the solution was obvious, just add caching.

speaker: Speaker A
text: That's not necessarily the right approach though.

speaker: Speaker B
text: Why not? It works perfectly fine!

speaker: Speaker A
text: Because we need to consider the data freshness requirements.

speaker: Speaker B
text: Fine, let's discuss it then.

speaker: Speaker A
text: The third issue was about accessibility. Screen readers can't parse our charts.

speaker: Speaker B
text: Oh that's a good point. We should add ARIA labels.

speaker: Speaker A
text: Exactly. And we need alt text for all the data visualizations.

speaker: Speaker B
text: I can take that on. Also about the sidebar thing I mentioned earlier...

speaker: Speaker A
text: Let me wrap up the feedback list first please.

speaker: Speaker B
text: Okay okay, sorry about that.

speaker: Speaker A
text: Last thing: users want dark mode. It's been requested a lot.

speaker: Speaker B
text: Dark mode is easy, I can do that in a day.

speaker: Speaker A
text: Alright, now let's prioritize these items together.
